title: Handling Emergency Stop
description:
Handling Emergency Stop

Handling Emergency Stop

After an emergency stop, you must reset the emergency stop condition before you can run the robot again.  To do this, provide a reset button with the EventTaskType set to 2 - NoEmgAbort.

Function frmMain_btnReset_Click(Sender$ As String)

		  Reset

			  If EStopOn Then

			    MsgBox "Estop could not be reset"

EndIf

Fend
examples:
Function frmMain_btnReset_Click(Sender$ As String)

		  Reset
			  If EStopOn Then
			    MsgBox "Estop could not be reset"

			  EndIf

Fend
